name: UseBitcoin
description: Buy prepaid Japan card codes using Bitcoin’s Lightning Network.
extendedDescription: Usebitcoin offers V-Preca Gift, DMM Points, Kyash gift codes, BitCash, au PAY gift cards, QUO Card Pay, and more, with new products added regularly. The operator, Cachet, is a Bitcoin-focused fintech company with the mission: “Bitcoin on every street—bringing Bitcoin payments to every street in the world.
